title: Binalonan Heat Wave
lead: Binalonan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.86. This anomaly is expected to have significant impacts on the city.
body:
The current heat wave in Binalonan has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 16.0 GG and zero Heating Degree Day (HDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 52% and wind speed is at 17.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
